title: Programs tab opens the programs list from Home
description: Verifies the Programs tab from the home dashboard navigates to the programs list view.

title: Nutrition tab opens the nutrition view from Home
description: Verifies the Nutrition tab from the home dashboard navigates to the nutrition tracking view.

title: Your Lab tab opens the exercise/food database from Home
description: Verifies the Your Lab tab from the home dashboard opens the database view.

title: Plus button opens the log hub from Home
description: Verifies the Plus button on the home dashboard opens the log hub panel/screen.

title: 1RM analytics and recovery indicators are visible on Home
description: Verifies the analytics and recovery sections render on the home dashboard.

title: Create a new training program and verify it appears in the Programs list
description: Verifies a user can create a program through the multi-step configuration and see it listed afterward.

steps.description: Type "Programa E2E 1" into the program name field

title: Program name required validation on Save
description: Verifies saving a new program with an empty name shows the expected validation message.

title: Cancel out of program creation without saving
description: Verifies the user can exit program creation and the unsaved program does not appear in the list.

steps.description: Type "Programa No Guardado" into the program name field
Verify text "Programa No Guardado" is not visible

title: Open an existing program from the Programs list
description: Verifies tapping a program card opens its program detail view.

title: Create a program with a long name and verify it displays correctly in the list
description: Verifies long program names can be saved and are visible in the programs list UI.

steps.description: Type "Programa con un nombre extremadamente largo para validar visualización" into the program name field
Verify text "Programa con un nombre extremadamente largo para validar visualización" is visible

title: Open Program Detail from Programs list and view sessions
description: Verifies a user can open a program detail screen and see the program structure and sessions list.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list

title: Switch between Weekly and Macrocycle views in Program Detail
description: Verifies the program structure view can be toggled between weekly and macrocycle modes.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list

title: Start workout from Program Detail when sessions exist
description: Verifies tapping Start workout from a program with sessions opens the workout session screen.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list

title: Show error when starting workout with no sessions defined
description: Verifies the user sees a visible error message when attempting to start a workout for a program with no sessions defined.

steps.description: Click on a program card that has no sessions defined
Verify text "No sessions defined" is visible

title: Open a session from Program Detail for editing
description: Verifies tapping a session item from the program detail opens a session edit/details screen.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a session in the sessions list

title: Use back button to return from Program Detail to Programs list
description: Verifies the back button returns the user from program detail to the programs list view.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list

title: Program Detail renders structure area even with minimal data
description: Verifies the program detail screen still shows the structure area and sessions section when a program has very little configured data.

steps.description: Click on a minimally configured program card (if available)

title: Create a new program via wizard and save it
description: Verifies a user can create a new program in the wizard, configure blocks/mesocycles/weeks, save, and see it in the programs list.

title: Start new program in wizard, then cancel and ensure no new program is added
description: Verifies canceling program creation returns to the programs list without adding a new program entry.

title: Wizard navigation shows Blocks then Mesocycles then Weeks configuration steps
description: Verifies the wizard exposes step-by-step configuration screens for blocks, mesocycles, and weeks.

title: Wizard Weeks step is reachable after Mesocycles step
description: Verifies the user can proceed from Mesocycles to Weeks within the wizard.

title: Attempt to save from wizard without completing required fields shows validation feedback (if present)
description: Verifies the editor prevents saving when required configuration is missing and shows visible validation messaging.

title: Save action returns user to Programs list view
description: Verifies that saving a program exits the editor and returns to the programs list screen.

title: Open advanced editor entry point (if available) for a new program
description: Verifies the user can access the advanced editor option from the new program creation flow (when available).

title: Edit a session end-to-end and save changes
description: Verifies a user can open a program session, add an exercise, edit set details including RPE, optionally mark competition lift, and save successfully.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a session in the program detail view

title: Add an exercise and fill sets, reps, weight, and RPE
description: Verifies set fields can be edited for an added exercise and the entered values are visible before saving.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a session in the program detail view
Fill "1" into the "Sets" field for the newly added exercise
Fill "5" into the "Reps" field for set 1

title: Edit weight and RPE for a set
description: Verifies weight and RPE fields accept input and remain visible in the session editor.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a session in the program detail view
Fill "100" into the "Weight" field for set 1
Fill "8" into the "RPE" field for set 1

title: Mark an exercise as a competition lift
description: Verifies a user can mark (and visually confirm) an exercise as a competition lift within the session editor.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a session in the program detail view
Click on the "Competition lift" toggle/checkbox for the newly added exercise

title: Save session with valid completed set details and see updates in program detail
description: Verifies saving a session succeeds and the user can see the updated session reflected back in the program detail view.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a session in the program detail view
Fill "5" into the "Reps" field for set 1

title: Validation error when trying to save with incomplete set details
description: Verifies the session editor blocks saving and shows the validation message when set details are incomplete.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a session in the program detail view
Verify text "Complete set details" is visible

title: Attempt to save after clearing a required numeric field shows validation
description: Verifies validation appears when a previously entered required field (e.g., reps) is cleared and the user attempts to save.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a session in the program detail view
Fill "5" into the "Reps" field for set 1
Fill "" into the "Reps" field for set 1

title: Complete a workout session end-to-end and view workout summary
description: Verifies a user can start a workout from a program, complete at least one set, and finish to reach the workout summary screen.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list

title: Cancel a workout session and confirm progress is discarded
description: Verifies canceling a workout requires confirmation and returns to program details with no active workout in progress.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list

title: Complete a set by entering weight and reps
description: Verifies the workout session allows entering weight and reps and marking a set as completed.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list

title: Use the rest timer between sets
description: Verifies a rest timer can be started during a workout and shows a visible running timer state.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on the "Start" button in the rest timer

title: Pause and resume the rest timer
description: Verifies the rest timer supports pausing and resuming during a workout session.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on the "Start" button in the rest timer
Click on the "Pause" button in the rest timer
Click on the "Resume" button in the rest timer

title: Record judging lights for a competition lift
description: Verifies judging lights can be selected during a workout when competition judging is available.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on a judging light option (for example, "White" or "Good lift")
Click on another judging light option

title: Finish workout from an in-progress session after completing at least one set
description: Verifies finishing a workout from an in-progress state results in a summary view reflecting completion flow.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list

title: Cancel workout from confirmation dialog by choosing not to discard
description: Verifies the cancel confirmation dialog can be dismissed to continue the workout without losing progress.

steps.description: Click on a program card in the programs list
Click on the "Cancel" button in the confirmation dialog

title: Open Nutrition view from app entry and see dashboard
description: Verifies the Nutrition tab opens the nutrition dashboard from the app entry screen.

title: Log a meal successfully and see dashboard updated
description: Verifies a user can log a meal by selecting a food, entering a portion, saving, and observing the dashboard reflect the new intake.

steps.description: Click on the first visible food item in the search results list

title: Log a meal and verify nutrition dashboard shows increased totals
description: Verifies that after saving a meal, the nutrition dashboard shows updated intake totals compared to the pre-save state.

steps.description: Click on the first visible food item in the search results list

title: Portion is required validation when saving a meal
description: Verifies the user cannot save a meal without a portion and sees the required validation message.

steps.description: Click on the first visible food item in the search results list

title: Search food database shows results for a common query
description: Verifies that searching the food database from the meal logging flow displays relevant results.

steps.description: Verify element "food search results" is visible

title: Search with no matches shows an empty state message
description: Verifies that an unlikely search query displays a clear no-results empty state in the food database search.

steps.description: Verify element "food search results" is visible

title: Cancel out of meal logging without saving and return to dashboard
description: Verifies the user can exit the meal logging flow without saving and is returned to the nutrition dashboard.

title: Portion input rejects non-numeric values
description: Verifies the portion field does not allow saving when the entered portion is not a valid number.

steps.description: Click on the first visible food item in the search results list

title: Create and save a custom exercise and verify it appears in the exercise database
description: Verifies a user can add a custom exercise with required fields, save it, and find it in the exercise database list.

steps.description: Verify text "Add Custom Exercise" is visible
Type "TS Custom Exercise 001" into the "Exercise Name" field
Verify text "TS Custom Exercise 001" is visible

title: Open an exercise detail from the database list
description: Verifies a user can browse the exercise database and open an exercise detail view.

steps.description: Click on the first exercise item in the list

title: Open the detail view for a newly created custom exercise
description: Verifies that a saved custom exercise can be opened and its detail page is reachable from the database list.

steps.description: Type "TS Custom Exercise 002" into the "Exercise Name" field
Click on "TS Custom Exercise 002" in the exercise database list
Verify text "TS Custom Exercise 002" is visible

title: Prevent saving a custom exercise with a duplicate name
description: Verifies the app blocks saving a custom exercise when the name duplicates an existing exercise name and shows the expected error.

steps.description: Type "TS Duplicate Exercise" into the "Exercise Name" field
Type "TS Duplicate Exercise" into the "Exercise Name" field
Verify text "Duplicate exercise name" is visible

title: Cancel out of adding a custom exercise without saving
description: Verifies a user can exit the add-custom-exercise flow and the unsaved exercise does not appear in the database list.

steps.description: Type "TS Unsaved Exercise" into the "Exercise Name" field
Verify text "TS Unsaved Exercise" is not visible

title: Browse the food database within Your Lab
description: Verifies a user can switch to the food database area of Your Lab and see food items listed.

title: Update preferences: change theme, toggle haptics and sound, and save
description: Verifies a user can update theme, haptics, and sound settings and successfully save the preferences.

title: Persisted settings: saved theme and toggles remain after leaving and returning to Settings
description: Verifies that saved preferences persist locally and are still applied when navigating away and back to Settings.

steps.description: Click on "Haptics" toggle to turn it on
Click on "Sound" toggle to turn it off

title: Manage data: clear local data and confirm success notification
description: Verifies a user can clear local data via Manage data and sees a success notification and returns to the home dashboard.

title: Theme options are available and selectable
description: Verifies the theme selector presents available options and allows switching between them without errors.

title: Settings page loads and core controls are visible
description: Verifies that the Settings screen renders and exposes theme, haptics, sound, and manage data entry points.
